items.title: Lost in last night’s hysteria: Sixers did really good work after opening up the non-taxpayer’s mid-level exception. It wasn’t going to be easy to find a better pair than Quentin Grimes and Kelly Oubre Jr. with $15 million. I think getting Dean Wade and Anfernee Simons qualifies.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Lost in last night’s hysteria: Sixers did really good work after opening up the non-taxpayer’s mid-level exception. It wasn’t going to be easy to find a better pair than Quentin Grimes and Kelly Oubre Jr. with $15 million. I think getting Dean Wade and Anfernee Simons qualifies.

items.title: The offer Quentin Grimes' former agent emphatically claimed the Sixers made last year: four years, $39 million. Sixers denied it, claiming there was never a formal offer because the gap was so large. Grimes played on $8.7 million qualifying offer last year, then changed agents.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: The offer Quentin Grimes' former agent emphatically claimed the Sixers made last year: four years, $39 million. Sixers denied it, claiming there was never a formal offer because the gap was so large. Grimes played on $8.7 million qualifying offer last year, then changed agents.

items.title: Gansey says the drafting of Philon does not change the team's plans for Quentin Grimes. Says the org has been in contact with both his and Kelly Oubre's representatives.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt: Gansey says the drafting of Philon does not change the team's plans for Quentin Grimes. Says the org has been in contact with both his and Kelly Oubre's representatives.

items.title: Mike Gansey said he's "hopeful" to bring back Quentin Grimes and Kelly Oubre, but isn't sure how it will play out. Said Labaron Philon's presence doesn't change that.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey said he's "hopeful" to bring back Quentin Grimes and Kelly Oubre, but isn't sure how it will play out. Said Labaron Philon's presence doesn't change that.

items.title: Asked Mike Gansey if the Labaron Philon Jr. pick will impact Quentin Grimes' upcoming free agency:
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Mike Gansey if the Labaron Philon Jr. pick will impact Quentin Grimes' upcoming free agency:

"This doesn't change it."

Gansey says "hopefully" the Sixers bring back Grimes and Kelly Oubre Jr., adding the team has been in contract with both of their representatives.
